subject: Indiana's 1st Secretary of Education
disclaimer_text: Paid for by the Indiana Republican Party
body:
We hope you've heard the exciting news! On Thursday, Governor Holcomb announced that Dr. Katie Jenner will serve as Indiana’s first... | | | [View this email in your browser](https://mailchi.mp/indiana/thankful-470018?e=1acd9bb3d6)
---
| | [ ](https://indgop.us11.list-manage.com/track/click?u=89fb3de929a99eecb88e6fb27&id=13e502d82f&e=1acd9bb3d6)
---
id:2020-04-23-15:43:59:705t
---
| Hoosier Republican,

We hope you've heard the exciting news!

**Today, Governor Holcomb announced that Dr. Katie Jenner will serve as Indiana’s first secretary of education. Dr. Jenner currently serves as Governor Holcomb’s senior education advisor.**

Her first position in K-12 education was as a career and technical education teacher. She's worked for Madison Consolidated Schools as a school administrator and district administrator. In 2018, she joined Ivy Tech Community College as vice president of K-12 initiatives and statewide partnerships, where she built statewide college strategies among K-12 schools, career centers, and Ivy Tech.

Dr. Jenner earned her undergraduate degree from Transylvania University, her master’s degree in education from the University of Kentucky, an MBA from Indiana State University, and her doctorate of education from the University of Kentucky.

**We're so excited to see Dr. Jenner get to work for Hoosier students, parents, and teachers! She will focus on personalizing education pathways for Hoosiers, championing our educators, and cultivating an education system built for innovation and success.**

And it looks like we're not the only ones who are excited. Check out what people are saying about Dr. Jenner!
---
|
---
| **What They're Saying:
Indiana's First Secretary of Education: Dr. Katie Jenner**
---
|
---
| _“This is an incredibly important time for education in Indiana. Dr. Katie Jenner has focused her entire career on investing in students, teachers and staff, and she will continue to build the relationships needed to move our state forward in constructive ways. As Indiana’s Secretary of Education, Dr. Jenner’s certification, work at nearly every level of education and her remarkable depth of experience will lead our state into this exciting next chapter.”
**-Governor Holcomb**_
---
|
---
| _"I’ve known Dr. Katie Jenner for many years and know she will do a great job."_
_**-Senator Todd Young**_
---
|
---
| _"Dr. Katie Jenner brings a vast array of education experience, including serving in the classroom, school administration and higher education. She's a great pick to fill this important role. I look forward to working with her to continue supporting our Hoosier students, teachers and schools."
**-Speaker of the House Todd Hu ston**_
---
|
---
| _“Gov. Holcomb has made a fantastic choice in naming Dr. Katie Jenner as his secretary of education. Senate Republicans share the governor and Dr. Jenner's goals of making sure our students are prepared to lead successful lives and supporting our students and teachers through this challenging time. Dr. Jenner is a highly qualified, dedicated, passionate educator, and I know she will serve our state and all of our students, teachers and schools well as she steps into the role of our state's first-ever secretary of education."
**-Senate President Pro Tem Rodric Bray**_
---
|
---
| _"Students, parents and educators are currently navigating a wide variety of challenges. Katie's knowledge and experiences from inside and outside the classroom will be valuable in the days ahead as we work on policies to support our schools during the pandemic and beyond. I look forward to working with Katie in her new role.”_
**-State Rep. Bob Behning**
---
|
---
| _“Katie Jenner has been a valuable voice for K-12 schools as the Governor’s senior education advisor. She recognizes the importance of aligning Indiana’s entire system of education, from preschool to higher education and the workforce."_
**-Teresa Lubbers, Commissioner, Commission for Higher Education**
---
|
---
| _“As the governor’s Senior Education Advisor, Dr. Jenner is someone ISTA has worked with on several education issues. Her experience in K – 12 education as a teacher and administrator is critical experience ISTA sought for Indiana’s first Secretary of Education. We look forward to working with Dr. Jenner to bring leaders together to invest in public schools, support Hoosier educators and provide the highest quality public education for our students.”
**-Indiana State Teachers Association**_
---
|
---
| _“What we are particularly excited about with Katie is in both her prior roles for the Madison Consolidated Schools and Ivy Tech Community College she worked closely with employers to better align K-12 education with workforce needs and opportunities. That’s a big positive for our business community, which requires homegrown talent. It also helps ensure that young people are prepared to pursue relevant and prosperous careers.”
**-Jason Bearce, Indiana Chamber VP, Education & Workforce Development **_
---
|
---
| _“Governor Holcomb made a stellar decision with the appointment of Dr. Katie Jenner. We have every confidence she will bring an inclusive approach to IDOE, and under her leadership, all of Indiana’s students, educators and schools will find a thoughtful partner.”
**-Institute for Quality Education **_
---
|
---
| _“Congratulations to Katie Jenner who has been appointed by Gov. Holcomb to serve as Indiana’s first education secretary. We look forward to working with her to ensure that parent voices remain front and center on important education issues across the state.”
**-Stand for Children **_
---
|
---
| _“Congratulations to Dr. Jenner for being appointed to this important role.”
**-Robert Enlow, President of EdChoice **_
---
|
---
| _“Congratulations to Dr. Katie Jenner on her appointment as Indiana's first Secretary of Education. We look forward to working with her in her new role. Best of luck!”
**– John Elcesser, Executive Director of Indiana Non-Public Education Association **_
---
|
---
| _"We are excited by Dr. Katie Jenner's appointment to be Indiana's first Secretary of Education. Katie shares our vision and values, & we look forward to supporting her in her efforts to advance Hoosier education for students, families, and educators."
**-Teach for America**_
---
|
---
| _"Congratulations to Dr. Katie Jenner on her appointment as Indiana's first Secretary of Education! We look forward to working with the new secretary and are encouraged by her focus on student and educator supports especially in response to the ongoing pandemic."
**-Teach Plus Indiana**_
---
|
---
| We couldn't be more excited for this announcement, and wanted to share that excitement with you!

Thank you,
Indiana Republican Party
---
|
---
---
---

name: =?utf-8?Q?Team=20Perdue?=
subject: Tom Cotton Comes To Georgia To Defend The Majority
body:
| | | [View this email in your browser](https://mailchi.mp/c7957e421de2/tickets-ga-gop-defend-the-majority-rally-with-vice-president-pence-for-senators-david-perdue-and-kelly-loeffler-66283?e=02cd889ad3)
---
|
---
| _**Tom Cotton Comes To Georgia To Defend The Majority**_
---
| Folks -

Last night, Senator David Perdue [joined](https://perduesenate.us14.list-manage.com/track/click?u=4ebb829fcdaef555ddec2107e&id=d94afb4f43&e=02cd889ad3) Fox News’ Sean Hannity to discuss what is at stake in the Georgia runoffs.

**SENATOR PERDUE → **
_"We are in the fight of our lives here. We are the last line of defense in Georgia. That's what makes every vote count right now in this. If we win Georgia, we save America... Kelly Loeffler and I are the Republican candidates for these two seats, and as I said the majority comes down to these two seats. It's our job to make sure that the people of Georgia know just what's at stake. _

_“We know what the Democrats want to do. They want illegal immigrants to vote. They want to defund the police. They want to take away our private health insurance, and they want to stack the courts. That's not what our government has always been about. It's been about checks and balances. Schumer said the other day, 'Now we take Georgia, then we change America.' AOC said, 'We want to win those two seats because we do not want to negotiate.' She wants the Green New Deal without compromise."_

**Click[ here](https://perduesenate.us14.list-manage.com/track/click?u=4ebb829fcdaef555ddec2107e&id=9bae48f026&e=02cd889ad3) or below to watch the segment. **
---
| [ ](https://perduesenate.us14.list-manage.com/track/click?u=4ebb829fcdaef555ddec2107e&id=296b75ba9b&e=02cd889ad3)
---
| _**It is so important to re-elect both David Perdue and Kelly Loeffler. Please, chip in[here](https://perduesenate.us14.list-manage.com/track/click?u=4ebb829fcdaef555ddec2107e&id=b27d17e35d&e=02cd889ad3).**_

**Today, Senator Tom Cotton visited Houston County, where Senator Perdue was raised, for a Defend the Majority Rally. **

_“The eyes of the world are on you, Georgia. They’re waiting to see what happens on January 5th... if we’re going to have a Republican majority that protects your rights, that protects your Second Amendment rights, that protects the lives of the unborn, that lets you keep more of your own money? Or, are we going to have Chuck Schumer and the Democrats in charge?

“We just learned recently that Raphael Warnock said you can’t serve God and the military at the same time. But I know that all those Privates that I went to basic training with on Sunday morning, well they thought you could serve God and be in the military at the same time. They went to church to thank God for getting them through another week of basic training!” _

**Click[here](https://perduesenate.us14.list-manage.com/track/click?u=4ebb829fcdaef555ddec2107e&id=e905390156&e=02cd889ad3) or below to watch Senators Cotton, Perdue and Loeffler speak at today's Defend the Majority Rally.**
---
| [ ](https://perduesenate.us14.list-manage.com/track/click?u=4ebb829fcdaef555ddec2107e&id=0da7dc11cc&e=02cd889ad3 "Defend The Majority Rally With Senators David Perdue, Kelly Loeffler, and Tom Cotton")
---
| _**Recently on Fox**_
---
| **LINDSEY GRAHAM →** “Ground zero for democracy is Georgia.” _Click[here](https://perduesenate.us14.list-manage.com/track/click?u=4ebb829fcdaef555ddec2107e&id=894ec22ae1&e=02cd889ad3) to watch and share._

**KARL ROVE →** “Bank that vote before Election Day,” he said. “That's exactly what the Democrats are doing and the Republicans better do the same.” _Click[here](https://perduesenate.us14.list-manage.com/track/click?u=4ebb829fcdaef555ddec2107e&id=95ea604865&e=02cd889ad3) to watch and share._

**HALEY BARBOUR →** “David Perdue got the most votes of any statewide Republican candidate in history.” _Click[here](https://perduesenate.us14.list-manage.com/track/click?u=4ebb829fcdaef555ddec2107e&id=e1bd0a490d&e=02cd889ad3) to watch and share._

**JONI ERNST → **Read Senator Joni Ernst's [op-ed](https://perduesenate.us14.list-manage.com/track/click?u=4ebb829fcdaef555ddec2107e&id=367235ade1&e=02cd889ad3) on what's at stake in Georgia at [FoxNews.com](https://perduesenate.us14.list-manage.com/track/click?u=4ebb829fcdaef555ddec2107e&id=df9332689c&e=02cd889ad3).

_“I’ve had the opportunity to work closely with David. I know he deeply cares about Georgians and making sure the federal government doesn’t overstep or get in the way of opportunity and economic growth. He’s worked in international business and has seen the harmful effects of other forms of government, like Communist China. Like me, David works across the aisle and has delivered bipartisan results for Georgians. We work together on the Senate Armed Services Committee to fight for our servicemembers, to get them the first pay raise in nearly a decade, and to help hold our adversaries, like China, accountable.”_

**OSSOFF OPPOSED PPP FUNDING →**

**[Check out this new video](https://perduesenate.us14.list-manage.com/track/click?u=4ebb829fcdaef555ddec2107e&id=9899e62ef6&e=02cd889ad3) calling out Jon Ossoff’s hypocritical opposition to the Paycheck Protection Program that saved 1.5 million jobs in Georgia, INCLUDING Ossoff's father's company. Senator Perdue championed the PPP through the Senate.**

**Click[here](https://perduesenate.us14.list-manage.com/track/click?u=4ebb829fcdaef555ddec2107e&id=7d6a088f7d&e=02cd889ad3) or below to watch the rest of the video. **
---
| [ ](https://perduesenate.us14.list-manage.com/track/click?u=4ebb829fcdaef555ddec2107e&id=0c3fafec4b&e=02cd889ad3 "Jon Ossoff: Politics over people")
---
| **GEORGIA VETS CALL ON WARNOCK TO DROP OUT ****→**

Today over 50 Georgia veterans called for Raphael Warnock to drop out of the Georgia Senate race after uncovered video showed him saying, “America, nobody can serve God and the military.”

In a [joint statement](https://perduesenate.us14.list-manage.com/track/click?u=4ebb829fcdaef555ddec2107e&id=5f1309e78a&e=02cd889ad3), the veterans said:

_“Raphael Warnock’s comments about military men and women are despicable and flat-out wrong. Here in Georgia, true leaders recognize the service and sacrifice of all who have courageously defended our nation’s freedom. It’s sad to see Raphael Warnock is more interested in insulting and condemning our military than in building communities that support and protect them. We stand together in calling on Raphael Warnock to drop out immediately, and we remain grateful to those who honor our fellow men and women in uniform – and our Creator.” _

_**Facebook has banned us from advertising. We need YOUR HELP to get our message out. Forward this message to 10 friends.**_

_###_
---
| [DONATE NOW!](https://perduesenate.us14.list-manage.com/track/click?u=4ebb829fcdaef555ddec2107e&id=536ede9aaf&e=02cd889ad3 "DONATE NOW!")
---
| [VOLUNTEER](https://perduesenate.us14.list-manage.com/track/click?u=4ebb829fcdaef555ddec2107e&id=e83e2fce85&e=02cd889ad3 "VOLUNTEER")
---
| | _Join us at PerdueSenate.com and make this the largest grassroots effort in Georgia history to re-elect Senators David Perdue and Kelly Loeffler._
---
| | | | | | | [](https://perduesenate.us14.list-manage.com/track/click?u=4ebb829fcdaef555ddec2107e&id=5f1e492492&e=02cd889ad3)
---
| | [](https://perduesenate.us14.list-manage.com/track/click?u=4ebb829fcdaef555ddec2107e&id=c7f5010ee5&e=02cd889ad3)
---
| | [](https://perduesenate.us14.list-manage.com/track/click?u=4ebb829fcdaef555ddec2107e&id=d2fa2c903b&e=02cd889ad3)
---
|
---
| _Copyright © Perdue For Senate, All rights reserved._

Want to change how you receive these emails?
You can [update your preferences](https://perduesenate.us14.list-manage.com/profile?u=4ebb829fcdaef555ddec2107e&id=a4d292c925&e=02cd889ad3) or [unsubscribe from this list](https://perduesenate.us14.list-manage.com/unsubscribe?u=4ebb829fcdaef555ddec2107e&id=a4d292c925&e=02cd889ad3&c=23841504c5).

name: Bo Snerdley
subject: We Aren’t Done Yet
disclaimer_text: Paid for by New Journey PAC
body:
We Aren't Done Yet [](http://email.vervemail.com/ct/56360606:6_ynpjuZN:m:1:3206719985:B88A1F1DA1A80A510FFE1F387E614BDF:r "Counting Votes") Peter: **_Our job in Georgia just got harder._** We are already laying the groundwork to fight to maintain Republican control of the Senate by winning the two runoff elections for U.S. Senate. Now, the state has announced a full recount of all ballots for President - to be done by HAND. Biden is only winning the state by just over 14,000 votes - a full audit and hand recount of LEGAL votes can erase that lead, but only if we have people, we can trust overseeing the process. | | [STOP THE STEAL - DONATE TODAY](http://email.vervemail.com/ct/56360606:6_ynpjuZN:m:1:3206719985:B88A1F1DA1A80A510FFE1F387E614BDF:r "STOP THE STEAL - DONATE TODAY")
---
My name is James Golden, but you may know me better as Bo Snerdley - producer and call screener for the one and only Rush Limbaugh. I started the New Journey PAC to help Black Republican candidates across the country.
**5 million votes, counted by hand - our conservative volunteers need to be recruited, trained, fed, supported.** _More_ than anything else, we need lots and lots of COFFEE.
**If we let them steal the Presidential election here, they will almost certainly steal the 2 runoff Senate races and we need to be prepared to stop them now and not be blindsided in January.[Will you chip in $50 right now to our Georgia Victory Fund?](http://email.vervemail.com/ct/56360607:6_ynpjuZN:m:1:3206719985:B88A1F1DA1A80A510FFE1F387E614BDF:r "Will you chip in $50 right now to our Georgia Victory Fund?")**
We are fighting for the very foundation of our democracy. We need to know that conservative America is standing with us.
**We are 100% supported by donations from conservatives like you.** **[Please donate as much as you can to this critical fight before it is too late.](http://email.vervemail.com/ct/56360606:6_ynpjuZN:m:1:3206719985:B88A1F1DA1A80A510FFE1F387E614BDF:r "Please donate as much as you can to this critical fight before
it is too late.")**
The Democrats aren't stupid, they are doing the same math we are, and they know how important this recount is to the future of our nation. Democrat operatives are booking flights RIGHT NOW and we need to get to Georgia and start fighting.
We need to win this Presidential Election, and then secure these 2 Senate seats to ensure America has a firewall in the U.S. Senate against the radically progressive Biden-Harris-Pelosi agenda.
When the history of this monumental time in our history is written - what will you say you did to help?
**Will you do all you can to help us?**
For a New Journey,
[](http://email.vervemail.com/ct/56360606:6_ynpjuZN:m:1:3206719985:B88A1F1DA1A80A510FFE1F387E614BDF:r "James Golden, AKA Bo Snerdley")
James Golden, AKA Bo Snerdley
Founder, New Journey PAC
| **Paid for by New Journey PAC
Not Authorized by Any Candidate or Candidate's Committee**

clean_body: I'm asking for your help today, and here's why. == Friend, I'm asking for your help today, and here's why: Senate Democrats are determined to spread their liberal agenda across America if they flip the Senate, working to turn EVERY STATE into the next New York or California. And, unfortunately, taking control of the Senate is within their reach if conservatives across the nation don't work together to == You see, my good friend Republican David Perdue is running to fend off radical Jon Ossoff. Despite what his supporters in the mainstream media say, Ossoff is a trust-fund socialist. He endorsed Joe Biden and Kamala Harris, and even went as far as saying about Donald Trump supporters "you're not just going to get beaten. You're going to get beaten so bad you can never run or show your face in public." This runoff election is more important than we ever could have imagined, Friend. We need to fight back in order to stop the far-Left mob before it's too late, and that starts with keeping Georgia's U.S. Senate seat RED. Will you join me in helping Republicans win this critical runoff? == == == == == == == Liberal Jon Ossoff has demonstrated nothing but enthusiasm for anti-law enforcement, pro-abortion, pro-open borders and pro-mob rule. His socialist vision for Georgia is simply DANGEROUS for the American people. Every dollar we raise sends a message to Chuck Schumer, Nancy Pelosi, and the liberal Democrats that the Silent Majority is stronger than ever and the Senate Majority is not up for grabs! == I cannot overstate the importance of this race. Our Republican Majority is on the line. Don't wait - == In service, == Tom Cotton == Republican Senator from Arkansas Paid for by Perdue for Senate | | Perdue for Senate | PO Box 12077, Atlanta, GA 30355 | | Sent by mailto:action@standupforliberty.net powered by

\------Begin forwarded message------ Subject: Stop the Steal! From: Matt Gaetz <[info@mattgaetz.com](mailto:info@mattgaetz.com)> Date: Tuesday, November 17, 2020 at 3:48 PM
Patriot,
We must fight back against the forces that are trying to steal this election from President Trump. It's no surprise the Democrats have resorted to voter fraud and counting illegal votes to give the victory to Joe Biden.
We must have full transparency in the election process. This is crucial to ensure the integrity of the election and to secure our democratic process from fraud. The people deserve to know that every single LEGAL vote was received and counted before declaring a winner.
As it stands, I am fighting back against the Democrats and their activist judges who made our elections less safe and ripe for fraud. I am [standing up for election integrity](http://r20.rs6.net/tn.jsp?f=0017QAjohXXaUvf2Cf4plBecj2gIhx1G0l3n94LkrFcYFgXkJ7ky58EYSvWPp50XLHH_NP0heHTaPdgfIS0MlNeB9Bv-0-oKkGk98F86zhQzNuXrzYEcSXZuTEU9aX9riqKcxiVMYknBa_x7dsK4L0XlSscJxJzVyli2MRRlB2KyN8GZL6f7cLjHXftGUCzhXa5&c=jLxMky2Av4IY7QsbhKAYCqa_8itGycC7uR6ML35KqvMZUe2hU4b9ag==&ch=Y-oiO_8uT3qQH4nuB9W0v_FM4VSpKFvjoIWz-XHEGdHcJKvLMGYJtw==), and I need you to stand with me.

body:
I'm activating emergency donation matching to make this our biggest rally to date. All donations from now until our rally finishes will receive a 6X donation match.
[](http://r20.rs6.net/tn.jsp?f=001z4nUVPsyPKY-TCYq8JahBRZpcyuD1C7zqOaQDbhMKE5K_2bvY6vBacLW1Uwi_FFo-fj1VeNtRT3wtygZ6glpnfw64NHpZs0XqGnLgURw_H3Mh56qHYHrDzUVRkitZ1iZ5C46Od7NI8xvhtnsim0DcjBZcSb8vmALKN7MD1Cb2TTEA6HXel_ywJg2ClPsUCiTYGRKgMqveedSeD90354LwZGKrTiCjKOJ42xExL4nrEhp8UPZQ-W7wPDRvrv4RMTvRO0TbAICodTWltshFRv2OttL0AcxR5RMVL8j7lqqQogqMDlGWqv2wnZk7jRoo2jG7VxfSgkZy1ZLz1mUHf49iIOVF-7c0DScBmLhCJLOg9fTMXMAY1rBb2qJVtDTFviDoj7X2jap8g7GU6vafSjogH5ASDWJ8gdAB9HSQTbocOo_8VTgCtsqlNPBqZce2NKECVN58PjwvhM9BKpoN0tci4N_v2zBJCEbZiNT2QqAQZA=&c=Bk9gE7wCHr7Er1JeIS0CqfqqrLMMjYVaK9gJwQ1s0oaXxBFWm302qw==&ch=6e_TUnazh0zXi_mjvNfgSojhhfWM9uU9g01KLv0qE7mbbPQglIznlg==)

name: Marco Rubio
subject: Why is this not being talked about?
disclaimer_text: Paid for by Marco Rubio for Senate
body:
Friend,
**What is coming in the next few weeks and months is catastrophic.**
Small businesses are on the brink of being destroyed. _Many are one shut down order away, one pandemic outbreak away, from being wiped out all together._
The cascading effect is extraordinary. Millions upon millions of people are at risk of losing their jobs. Imagine another wave of unemployment, not to mention all the businesses shuttering up.
[**Click here to add your name to the Small Business Support List >>**](http://r20.rs6.net/tn.jsp?f=001FmiS0BebLYAiSkh22bXIzWlf4H5pkYma4IGpXomK5dSnkqxdpCAOsf7ZmqwDKvSdN88Quylsw7s5I0-7LP8Gy7Z2_fE7j13PVx7VBTPZ7UZA2K3AecLFvp_g0Io2yAlnntYeTrMZAqonCrhEWwRXCiWgu5dfaKrCZ1NXFXihtxZTJjz5U2KBGi8h9vgcCmqaGBdopXdcKGACljzogr747DMvP6lT_JQMmaE9l28Z7LEuAxNyUsu-V4hEeNa_btWyk_KSC_NP6MJikU8BBnY2vsAVnmCuE-LgmoW69Z798ZFZ3hOLQtatnZuNhH3AfSG2yZrB2OlbVdHByCiU-OkaClL0gTezjq2rUWFfXOxKZ52ObvlBbVSNFB3SzP85h7NJ7XY1fryZ3rQ9fgZvqlz7w8olPmGzC62iLnXUH3X2-AU6LjPSbURi8TcrNNEdzB1Iv79eal33hCHn7QzPKuhz-A==&c=o2TUNECabxPoLv-6Z7jHZ1d-5Ygit7_wnyZGlUesaYEXD72Qkwb0bw==&ch=g5gmVJjUxd75AzYvmALAXxQrW8y_lUMa-CCSoSB5moIZ4PJHoWrQCQ==)
We NEED another round of PPP assistance. It is now or never- if we do not prepare today by putting this in place, the devastating cycle we went through in the spring could be even worse.
Some of these companies barely survived the first wave. I am already seeing many states enacting curfews for small businesses and others shutting them down all together. All of these businesses are going to just disappear.
**_I personally know people who will have no other choice but to close their businesses two months from now if we don 't help them. That just adds to the urgency of the situation. These small companies going out of business will affect ALL of us._**
We need to send a message to the Democrats to **STOP** blocking assistance for small businesses and push this aid through.
[**Click here to add your name to the Small Business Support List >>**](http://r20.rs6.net/tn.jsp?f=001FmiS0BebLYAiSkh22bXIzWlf4H5pkYma4IGpXomK5dSnkqxdpCAOsf7ZmqwDKvSdN88Quylsw7s5I0-7LP8Gy7Z2_fE7j13PVx7VBTPZ7UZA2K3AecLFvp_g0Io2yAlnntYeTrMZAqonCrhEWwRXCiWgu5dfaKrCZ1NXFXihtxZTJjz5U2KBGi8h9vgcCmqaGBdopXdcKGACljzogr747DMvP6lT_JQMmaE9l28Z7LEuAxNyUsu-V4hEeNa_btWyk_KSC_NP6MJikU8BBnY2vsAVnmCuE-LgmoW69Z798ZFZ3hOLQtatnZuNhH3AfSG2yZrB2OlbVdHByCiU-OkaClL0gTezjq2rUWFfXOxKZ52ObvlBbVSNFB3SzP85h7NJ7XY1fryZ3rQ9fgZvqlz7w8olPmGzC62iLnXUH3X2-AU6LjPSbURi8TcrNNEdzB1Iv79eal33hCHn7QzPKuhz-A==&c=o2TUNECabxPoLv-6Z7jHZ1d-5Ygit7_wnyZGlUesaYEXD72Qkwb0bw==&ch=g5gmVJjUxd75AzYvmALAXxQrW8y_lUMa-CCSoSB5moIZ4PJHoWrQCQ==)
Friend, if we do nothing, we will lose **_EVERYTHING._**
**Nothing at this moment is more urgent than helping these small businesses survive.**
[Will you join me TODAY in support of small businesses, their owners, and their employees?](http://r20.rs6.net/tn.jsp?f=001FmiS0BebLYAiSkh22bXIzWlf4H5pkYma4IGpXomK5dSnkqxdpCAOsf7ZmqwDKvSdN88Quylsw7s5I0-7LP8Gy7Z2_fE7j13PVx7VBTPZ7UZA2K3AecLFvp_g0Io2yAlnntYeTrMZAqonCrhEWwRXCiWgu5dfaKrCZ1NXFXihtxZTJjz5U2KBGi8h9vgcCmqaGBdopXdcKGACljzogr747DMvP6lT_JQMmaE9l28Z7LEuAxNyUsu-V4hEeNa_btWyk_KSC_NP6MJikU8BBnY2vsAVnmCuE-LgmoW69Z798ZFZ3hOLQtatnZuNhH3AfSG2yZrB2OlbVdHByCiU-OkaClL0gTezjq2rUWFfXOxKZ52ObvlBbVSNFB3SzP85h7NJ7XY1fryZ3rQ9fgZvqlz7w8olPmGzC62iLnXUH3X2-AU6LjPSbURi8TcrNNEdzB1Iv79eal33hCHn7QzPKuhz-A==&c=o2TUNECabxPoLv-6Z7jHZ1d-5Ygit7_wnyZGlUesaYEXD72Qkwb0bw==&ch=g5gmVJjUxd75AzYvmALAXxQrW8y_lUMa-CCSoSB5moIZ4PJHoWrQCQ==) Whether it is signing your name to the list, donating whatever you can give, or calling your Members of Congress and Senators to urge them to give their support.
[**Click here to add your name to the Small Business Support List >>**](http://r20.rs6.net/tn.jsp?f=001FmiS0BebLYAiSkh22bXIzWlf4H5pkYma4IGpXomK5dSnkqxdpCAOsf7ZmqwDKvSdN88Quylsw7s5I0-7LP8Gy7Z2_fE7j13PVx7VBTPZ7UZA2K3AecLFvp_g0Io2yAlnntYeTrMZAqonCrhEWwRXCiWgu5dfaKrCZ1NXFXihtxZTJjz5U2KBGi8h9vgcCmqaGBdopXdcKGACljzogr747DMvP6lT_JQMmaE9l28Z7LEuAxNyUsu-V4hEeNa_btWyk_KSC_NP6MJikU8BBnY2vsAVnmCuE-LgmoW69Z798ZFZ3hOLQtatnZuNhH3AfSG2yZrB2OlbVdHByCiU-OkaClL0gTezjq2rUWFfXOxKZ52ObvlBbVSNFB3SzP85h7NJ7XY1fryZ3rQ9fgZvqlz7w8olPmGzC62iLnXUH3X2-AU6LjPSbURi8TcrNNEdzB1Iv79eal33hCHn7QzPKuhz-A==&c=o2TUNECabxPoLv-6Z7jHZ1d-5Ygit7_wnyZGlUesaYEXD72Qkwb0bw==&ch=g5gmVJjUxd75AzYvmALAXxQrW8y_lUMa-CCSoSB5moIZ4PJHoWrQCQ==)
**Every little thing helps.**
Thank you so much for your all that you do, Friend. We couldn't do this without you.
Best,
Marco Rubio

name: Jake Duesenberg
subject: No Friends, Says Walz
body:
| [ ](http://www.action4liberty.com/?e=44f3e77e3a436673570805f6f24387d1&utm_source=action4liberty&utm_medium=email&utm_campaign=want_to_go_to_jail_r&n=1)
---
Peter \-- Walz just prohibited you from having friends over to your house. Want to do a backyard fire with the neighbors in this nice weather. He's forbidding it. Can you believe that? **What happened to our Republic?!** I, personally, never consented to being ruled by one politician. In fact, I've pledge my loyalty thousands of times "to the Republic". Who is Walz to think he can erode away our long-held system of government with the swipe of a pen! Walz' newest decree now makes it illegal for you to have anyone inside your home that's not from your family. Violate that unilateral order, WHICH I WILL, and you could be punished with **90 days in jail**. Own a restaurant or bar? **CLOSED** Go to the gym or make your livlihood by improving people's health and immune systems? **CLOSED** Want to get away for a movie with the spouse? **CLOSED** Want to watch your kid's hockey game? **BANNED** I can't imagine the irreparable harm that will be done to our beloved small businesses. 2020 has already been difficult for them to make ends meet. This order will be the death blow. **Walz warns us of full capacity at the hospitals. That's a real issue. In fact, that's THE issue. What the hell has he been doing for these 250 days of emergency?!** Here's what I'm worried about... A Harvard study found that nearly 1/3 of young adults have had suicidal thoughts this year. And 47% of young adults are suffering from "depressive symptoms". Walz' message to them is that they are the ones who are selfish and causing grandma to go to the hospital. Meanwhile, their survivability rate is near 100%. But Walz is forcing them to isolate?!
## Are you angry now!
**We're excited that we helped get four****democrats fired in November's election. And we can't wait til these new legislators take office in January. But quite frankly, we simply can't wait that long. We owe it to you and the business community to end this battle as soon as possible.** When Walz' extends his Emergency Powers again for 30 days, we MUST overwhelm weak-kneed Republican legislators and vulnerable Democrats with ads, phone calls and other methods. We need to pound them into submission - finally Ending Walz' Emergency Powers once and for all. We can't let him get away with this anymore. | [](https://www.action4liberty.com/donate?e=44f3e77e3a436673570805f6f24387d1&utm_source=action4liberty&utm_medium=email&utm_campaign=want_to_go_to_jail_r&n=2 "DONATE") [DONATE](https://www.action4liberty.com/donate?e=44f3e77e3a436673570805f6f24387d1&utm_source=action4liberty&utm_medium=email&utm_campaign=want_to_go_to_jail_r&n=3)
---
Did you see the news this week about two prominent Democrat state senators leaving the DFL caucus? There are moves being made right now and it's important that we seize on these opportunities immediately.
**Our team knows where the pressure points are. Minnesotans have had ENOUGH of Walz' unilateral orders, so we'll have the wind at our back. But we MUST ensure that effort is focused on the legislature where we have the best opportunity to finally End Walz' Emergency Powers.**
Help us get our message to more Minnesotans and help us fund our pressure campaign. Hundreds of thousands of Minnesotans NEED to hear our message of liberty NOW. And every legislator that can be swayed must feel the pain by the time they meet again.
## [Yes, I want to STOP Governor Walz!](https://action4liberty.nationbuilder.com/donate?e=44f3e77e3a436673570805f6f24387d1&utm_source=action4liberty&utm_medium=email&utm_campaign=want_to_go_to_jail_r&n=4)
Thank you in advance for your contribution.
**In Liberty,

**
**Jake Duesenberg**
**President, Action 4 Liberty**
**P.S.****[Please help us expand our voice. Pitch in $100 if you can. If that's too much, help us out with $50 or $25. Or for max pain, donate $1,000.](https://action4liberty.nationbuilder.com/donate?e=44f3e77e3a436673570805f6f24387d1&utm_source=action4liberty&utm_medium=email&utm_campaign=want_to_go_to_jail_r&n=5)**
Action 4 Liberty · United States
This email was sent to [dpwillis67@gmail.com](dpwillis67@gmail.com). To stop receiving emails, [click here](https://www.action4liberty.com/unsubscribe?e=44f3e77e3a436673570805f6f24387d1&utm_source=action4liberty&utm_medium=email&utm_campaign=want_to_go_to_jail_r&n=6).
You can also keep up with Jake Duesenberg on [Facebook](https://www.action4liberty.com/r?u=27Ax0UmWOX2J8J_QwK9Z6nyVoJL5zCIi1gu8lCoYmQrA8P7rhuOjJmdy-IRmglie&e=44f3e77e3a436673570805f6f24387d1&utm_source=action4liberty&utm_medium=email&utm_campaign=want_to_go_to_jail_r&n=7).
Created with [NationBuilder](https://www.action4liberty.com/r?u=SWqLExi-4iBlEOa5qgO58jA2d62deOsOLwOgchKDecY&e=44f3e77e3a436673570805f6f24387d1&utm_source=action4liberty&utm_medium=email&utm_campaign=want_to_go_to_jail_r&n=8), software for leaders.

I'm in between meetings so this will have to be quick.

**This is what that means: I need to do a lot of work on the ground. I need to print tens of thousands of flyers and stickers, print 2,500 t-shirts, and buy 468 billboard signs ALL BY THIS WEEKEND.

That requires a lot of cash.**

[**Could you chip in $10, $20 or even $50 to my campaign today? This would greatly help me print these necessary materials. Your donation would go STRAIGHT to our emergency fund and would directly impact the Senate Majority in the United States.**](http://paracom.paramountcommunication.com/ct/56897297:sgJ5KMKEN:m:1:2247059263:E9EE312121C574507C9ED1403A4C176D:r)

****

Kelly Loeffler

name: =?utf-8?Q?Kyle=20Hupfer=2C=20Chairman=20Indiana=20Republican=20Party?=
subject: It all comes down to Georgia
disclaimer_text: Paid for by the Indiana Republican Party
body:
It is CRITICAL that we keep our Senate majority! Read more >>

View this email in your browser (https://mailchi.mp/indiana/thankful-470014?e=1acd9bb3d6)
https://secure.winred.com/indiana-republican-party/pg-georgia-runoff-111920?utm_source=email_PG&utm_campaign=ingop&utm_medium=Email&utm_content=pg_georgia_runoff_111920&exitintent=true&mc_cid=8ae1ddb22d&mc_eid=[UNIQID]
id:2020-04-23-15:43:59:705t

Hoosier Republican,

President Trump is still in the fight for the White House. But with Democrats controlling the House and the future of our nation hanging in the balance, it’s more critical than ever that Republicans hold control of the U.S. Senate.

No matter what happens, we can be sure of one thing. The radical left is going to pour EVERYTHING they have into the Senate runoff in Georgia. If they win those, they’ll have unchecked power in Washington, D.C.

Both of Georgia’s Senate seats are headed for runoffs in January, and if we lose them, we’re going to lose control of the Senate. If the Democrats get total control in Washington, there will be nothing we can do to stop them from packing the Supreme Court, implementing the job-killing Green New Deal, ending our energy independence, and more!

It is CRITICALLY important that we support the Republicans in these two races — Kelly Loeffler and David Perdue.

We’ve come too far in Indiana and won too much as Hoosier Republicans to let the radical left take over the federal government. We need a check on their power so we can continue to implement conservative solutions in the Hoosier State.

We’ve won all the home games here, now we need your help to win one on the road.

Please donate as much as you’re able before midnight on 11/20 for a three-way split between Kelly Loeffler, David Perdue, and Indiana Republicans!
SAVE THE SENATE! >> (https://secure.winred.com/indiana-republican-party/pg-georgia-runoff-111920?utm_source=email_PG&utm_campaign=ingop&utm_medium=Email&utm_content=pg_georgia_runoff_111920&mc_cid=8ae1ddb22d&mc_eid=[UNIQID])

We can keep Nancy Pelosi and the future of our nation in check...but only if we keep our Republican majority in the Senate. Please help us hold it!

Thank you,
Kyle Hupfer
Chairman
Indiana Republican Party

name: Jason Yates, My Faith Votes
subject: We are at work in Georgia
body:
| | Peter, As we continue to await the presidential election results, the future of the U.S Senate hinges on the Georgia run-off Senate elections scheduled for January 5, 2020. Your support has made it possible for us to get right to work. Our ground game in Georgia to equip and motivate Christians to vote is already underway. I want to share with you our strategy in Georgia and My Faith Votes’ vision and plan moving forward. I’ve put together this [**_brief update article_**](https://www2.myfaithvotes.org/r?u=6_nuz-gPbh4AR2HufX66icYcIyRhB2URpXghNXmPGvOq0B28yADZ-L48mBsq1RL2uQ13h6qrDRRg2F1-eX6BgtvBUNAhk0uBHgd3CPcEcGs&e=be53806c85fc17bd685e1e4c4d896e92&utm_source=myfaithvotes&utm_medium=email&utm_campaign=e201120com01&n=1 "brief update article") for you. Please continue to stand united in prayer. We will seize every opportunity we have to help Christians advance biblical policies and put in authority God-fearing and honoring candidates. [](https://www2.myfaithvotes.org/r?u=6_nuz-gPbh4AR2HufX66icYcIyRhB2URpXghNXmPGvOq0B28yADZ-L48mBsq1RL2uQ13h6qrDRRg2F1-eX6BgtvBUNAhk0uBHgd3CPcEcGs&e=be53806c85fc17bd685e1e4c4d896e92&utm_source=myfaithvotes&utm_medium=email&utm_campaign=e201120com01&n=2) **United. We Stand.** Jason Yates
CEO
[](https://www2.myfaithvotes.org/r?u=FvZODUdzRCV4_QVEoUI5Y_LYDGbWPUdf00keax2EMv8&e=be53806c85fc17bd685e1e4c4d896e92&utm_source=myfaithvotes&utm_medium=email&utm_campaign=e201120com01&n=3)

clean_body: Our historic campaign is over and South Carolina’s First District finally has real leadership again. But our work is just getting started. Hey friend - do you have a second? Our historic campaign is over and I'm ready to get to work for South Carolina’s First District. But, friend, our work is just getting started. Nancy is already hard at work developing her Lowcountry First agenda, but in order to do that in Congress, she needs to know what issues matter the most to you. That’s why we’re reaching out right now — we need to hear from you about the problems and challenges facing Lowcountry businesses, families, and workers. Thank you for making your voice heard. Best, Mace Survey Team | | | | Paid for by Nancy Mace for Congress | | 295 Seven Farms Drive C-186 Charleston, SC 29492 | | This email was sent to dpwillis67@gmail.com | | |

name: Laura Loomer
subject: Bill Gates and Voting
body:
First, thank you so much for your support for my campaign. While the results weren’t what we were hoping . . . we are not done!
| | | [](https://em.lauraloomerforcongress.com/ga/click/2-561017072-4395-402809-947549-5305955-667b78fba0-1c8ffd593c)
Patriot,

[](https://em.lauraloomerforcongress.com/ga/click/2-561017072-4395-402809-947549-5305955-667b78fba0-1c8ffd593c) First, thank you so much for your support for my campaign. While the results weren’t what we were hoping . . . we are not done!

The results of my run for Congress are emblematic of what we’re seeing around the nation.

On Election Day, I was ahead by 23% and I was even ahead in Early Voting by 3% . . . but then the mail-in ballots were tallied, and my lead evaporated and became insurmountable.

Following Election Day, we all began to hear reports of voting irregularities, so I got to work.

By now, you’ve probably already heard of “Dominion Voting Systems” but you probably didn’t know that an integral part of that system along with all major voting systems is a piece of software that was developed by nonother than Bill Gates’ Microsoft.

**Microsoft’s software is called “ElectionGuard” and was developed as part of Bill Gates’s “Defending Democracy” program in 2018 with the goal of ERADICATING in-person voting.**

More to come on that.

While I work through this research, [**please donate now to help me retire my remaining campaign expenses**](https://em.lauraloomerforcongress.com/ga/click/2-561017072-4395-402809-947549-5305955-667b78fba0-1c8ffd593c).

The last few weeks of the campaign was a whirlwind of activity and expenses and we have several outstanding invoices to cover.

[**If you’re able, please make a donation of $10 or more and help me close the books on 2020 and move forward.**](https://em.lauraloomerforcongress.com/ga/click/2-561017072-4395-402809-947549-5305955-667b78fba0-1c8ffd593c)

Thank you again for all that you do and stay tuned for more to come.

Respectfully,

Laura Loomer

Paid for by Laura Loomer for Congress Inc Contributions to Laura Loomer for Congress Inc are not tax deductible for federal income tax purposes. Contributions from corporations, labor unions, federal contractors, and foreign nationals are prohibited.

---

720 Lucerne Ave, #1465
LAKE WORTH, FL. 33460

name: Senator Chris Van Hollen
subject: Senate Update: Safeguarding Our Democracy
body:
| | | [Click here to open this e-mail in its own browser window](https://outreach.senate.gov/iqextranet//view_newsletter_setup.aspx?link=SenVanHollen%2501148120%250111-20-2020%2beNewsletter_FINAL_400pm%250115649.21668998.4954159.7517223%2501dpwillis67%2540gmail.com%2501Friend%2501dpwillis67%2540gmail.com%2501Silver%2bSpring%252c%2bMD%2b20906%2501) | [Click here to open a plain text version of this email](https://outreach.senate.gov/iqextranet//view_newsletter_setup.aspx?plain_text=Y&link=SenVanHollen%2501148120%250111-20-2020%2beNewsletter_FINAL_400pm%250115649.21668998.4954159.7517223%2501dpwillis67%2540gmail.com%2501Friend%2501dpwillis67%2540gmail.com%2501Silver%2bSpring%252c%2bMD%2b20906%2501)
---|---
| | | **November 20, 2020** |
---|---|---|---
| | | On January 20th, Joe Biden and Kamala Harris will be sworn in as the next President and Vice President of the United States. But even though the American people have spoken at the ballot box in this election, President Trump refuses to concede. And instead of standing up to the President's blatant disregard for the peaceful transfer of power, congressional Republicans are aiding and abetting his assault on our democratic institutions. This dangerous, false narrative is undermining public confidence in our democracy and distracting from the urgent work of passing another round of much-needed pandemic emergency relief as COVID-19 cases surge in Maryland and around the country.
---
### Defending the Peaceful Transfer of Power
Make no mistake: just because Joe Biden and Kamala Harris won this election doesn't mean that what Donald Trump and so many Republican Senators are doing now is harmless. I recently [spoke](https://outreach.senate.gov/iqextranet/iqClickTrk.aspx?&cid=SenVanHollen&crop=15649.21668998.4954159.7517223&report_id=&redirect=https%3a%2f%2fwww.vanhollen.senate.gov%2fnews%2fpress-releases%2fin-senate-floor-speech-van-hollen-slams-republican-refusal-to-accept-election-results&redir_log=118832586594974) on the Senate floor about how their actions are downright dangerous to our national security interests and the health of our democracy. In the death throes of his Administration, President Trump is replacing qualified individuals in charge of keeping our country safe with political lackeys whose only credentials are unwavering loyalty to him. The White House is also prohibiting the government from providing daily intelligence briefings to the President-elect. Access to these briefings is critical during a Presidential transition: it ensures that the Biden Administration can hit the ground running on day one and keeps our country safe from foreign adversaries seeking to exploit a moment of potential vulnerability in the United States. In fact, the 9/11 Commission Report advised that Presidential transitions should move as quickly as possible to expedite the identification, recruitment, clearance, and confirmation of key national security appointees. In addition to the threats we face from abroad, the Trump Administration's refusal to coordinate with the Biden transition threatens our nation's efforts against the ongoing coronavirus pandemic. The President's actions have blocked the Biden team from accessing official government data on our nation's pandemic response and consulting with federal experts. This has undermined the President-elect's ability to move forward on plans for a coordinated COVID-19 response, including efforts to address mask shortages and distribute a vaccine. As our nation faces an increasing number of cases by the day, we cannot afford to miss a beat in our response. From working to increase surge capacity across the country to approving and distributing a vaccine, we have no time to waste. The immediate consequences of these delays could not be more grave. In the long term, the President's behavior - and the silence or active complicity of so many Republican Senators - is undermining the confidence of the American people in the outcome of this election. Polling shows that 70 percent of Republicans believe this election was neither free nor fair. And this Administration's efforts to sow public distrust in this process plays directly into the hands of authoritarian leaders who want nothing more than to see democracy fail. Trump's actions are threatening our national security, hurting our response to the COVID-19 pandemic, eroding confidence in our elections, and impeding Joe Biden's ability to be a President for every American. Each hour that this lie persists is another hour that the health of our democracy is at risk.
### Demanding Action on COVID Relief
In the United States Senate, Majority Leader Mitch McConnell continues to block a Senate vote on a meaningful pandemic relief bill. After ignoring the House-passed HEROES Act for six months, McConnell said that a relief package would be his top priority after the election. Yet he seems focused exclusively on confirming more right-wing judges and has only put forth a shell of an emergency response bill - something that doesn't meet the magnitude of our health and economic needs. Even worse, his proposal seeks to cynically exploit this national emergency by including tax breaks for the wealthy and a formula that shortchanges school systems that rely on distance learning. Coronavirus cases are surging across the country. We are surpassing records for new daily cases, and over 250,000 Americans have lost their lives to this deadly disease. Public health officials warn that we are entering the pandemic's worst phase yet. Our communities, small businesses, and schools are struggling and need help now. Republicans have a choice to make: spend the next few months doing nothing while thousands of Americans struggle to get by and our economy continues to nosedive - or come back to the negotiating table and pass meaningful emergency relief. We need to find reasonable common ground. I won't let up in this fight until we provide real support to the American people.
### Funding Our Government and Maryland Priorities
Despite these troubling developments on COVID relief, I am glad to share some good news for our state. As a member of the Appropriations Committee, I prioritize fighting for critical resources for Maryland initiatives that require federal funds. This year I worked to secure a number of key provisions for Marylanders across our state within the proposed Appropriations bill texts released by the Committee's Republican leadership. This includes funds to support our schools, provide access to affordable health care, expand key federal facilities and installations in Maryland, modernize our infrastructure and transportation networks, and boost research and preservation efforts for the Chesapeake Bay. To keep Maryland moving forward, we must invest federal resources in our state and our communities. You can read more about these funds [here](https://outreach.senate.gov/iqextranet/iqClickTrk.aspx?&cid=SenVanHollen&crop=15649.21668998.4954159.7517223&report_id=&redirect=https%3a%2f%2fwww.vanhollen.senate.gov%2fnews%2fpress-releases%2fvan-hollen-announces-maryland-priorities-in-newly-released-senate-appropriations-bills&redir_log=642250766106988). While I'm pleased we were successful in including these Maryland priorities, these bills are far from perfect. I am deeply disappointed that the Republican Committee Leadership bypassed Committee mark-ups and instead opted for a partisan process to block amendments that I and others have proposed to address the pandemic response and systemic racism in our institutions. This is simply the first step proposed by Senate Republicans, and as we seek to pass final legislation, I will fight to remove the partisan poison pills and include funding for additional critical priorities in our state and country. Congress has a responsibility to fund our government, and I will be working to move these provisions forward while ensuring we avoid another Trump-led shameful government shutdown.
### Giving Thanks
In the fall of 1863, during the middle of the Civil War, Abraham Lincoln declared that the last Thursday of November would be a "day of Thanksgiving and Praise." This was the first time in American history that Thanksgiving was named a national holiday by a sitting President. Amid the hardship of a bloody conflict, Lincoln issued this proclamation that still rings true today. We are an unceasingly optimistic nation - and even in our darkest hours, we can always find ways to give thanks. While this Thanksgiving will look a little different than many others, there is still so much to be grateful for: from family and friends to all of those who have protected our democracy, fought for equality, and spoken truth to power. Despite these challenging times, I hope you're able to find joy in this time of thanksgiving, and I wish all Marylanders a happy and safe holiday. Chris Van Hollen P.S. It is now Open Season for [Maryland Health Connection](https://outreach.senate.gov/iqextranet/iqClickTrk.aspx?&cid=SenVanHollen&crop=15649.21668998.4954159.7517223&report_id=&redirect=https%3a%2f%2fwww.marylandhealthconnection.gov%2f&redir_log=621354806748293) and the [Federal Employee Health Benefits](https://outreach.senate.gov/iqextranet/iqClickTrk.aspx?&cid=SenVanHollen&crop=15649.21668998.4954159.7517223&report_id=&redirect=https%3a%2f%2fwww.opm.gov%2fhealthcare-insurance%2fopen-season%2f&redir_log=382511640681373) (FEHB) Program. Make sure you have all the information you need to get covered!
[](https://outreach.senate.gov/iqextranet/iqClickTrk.aspx?&cid=SenVanHollen&crop=15649.21668998.4954159.7517223&report_id=Facebook&redirect=https%3a%2f%2fwww.facebook.com%2fchrisvanhollen%2f&redir_log=328155479639284 "Facebook")[](https://outreach.senate.gov/iqextranet/iqClickTrk.aspx?&cid=SenVanHollen&crop=15649.21668998.4954159.7517223&report_id=Twitter&redirect=https%3a%2f%2ftwitter.com%2fChrisVanHollen&redir_log=957640916473241 "Twitter")[](https://outreach.senate.gov/iqextranet/iqClickTrk.aspx?&cid=SenVanHollen&crop=15649.21668998.4954159.7517223&report_id=Instagram&redirect=https%3a%2f%2fwww.instagram.com%2fchrisvanhollen%2f&redir_log=389295287187292 "Instagram")[](https://outreach.senate.gov/iqextranet/iqClickTrk.aspx?&cid=SenVanHollen&crop=15649.21668998.4954159.7517223&report_id=YouTube&redirect=https%3a%2f%2fwww.youtube.com%2fuser%2fRepChrisVanHollen&redir_log=463627374976326 "YouTube")[](https://outreach.senate.gov/iqextranet/iqClickTrk.aspx?&cid=SenVanHollen&crop=15649.21668998.4954159.7517223&report_id=&redirect=https%3a%2f%2fmedium.com%2f%40ChrisVanHollen&redir_log=575666539451239)
|
---
[Please click here to unsubscribe](https://outreach.senate.gov/iqextranet//EsurveyForm.aspx?__cid=SenVanHollen&__sid=100007&__crop=15649.21668998.4954159.7517223)

body:

The Mainstream Media (unsurprisingly) has called the election for Joe Biden, but President Trump’s legal team claims this race is far from over. They say they have evidence of significant voter fraud that could potentially overturn the unofficial results in multiple states. This is HUGE news! While the Mainstream Media (aka the Democratic Propaganda Network) would like you to believe the election is over, it is most definitely not. Yes - Georgia, Pennsylvania, Wisconsin and Michigan are still in play. Bottom line? The final results across the nation have not been certified. The legal battle is still ongoing. They faced a typically hostile media who showed their bias and lack of understanding of how the law and legal proceedings actually work, but his team was strong, they didn’t give an inch, and they refused to allow the press to get away with asking biased questions based on false premises.

Attorney Sidney Powell stated the following during the press conference,
_“This is stunning, heartbreaking, Infuriating and the most unpatriotic acts I can even imagine for people in this country to have participated in, in any way, shape or form, and I want the American public to know right now that we will not be intimidated. American patriots are fed up with the corruption from the local level to the highest level of our government, and we are going to take this country back._

_“We are not going to be intimidated. We are not going to back down. We are going to clean this mess up now. President Trump won by a landslide. We are going to prove it, and we are going to reclaim the United States of America for the people who vote for freedom.”_

With Thanksgiving quickly approaching, the Democrats’ actions are sadly predictable...

In the year where the radical Left’s “cancel culture” has gone almost entirely unchecked, much like the “woke” mob terrorizing Democrat-run cities, their latest target is unsurprising: Thanksgiving.

Overreaching Democratic officials are attempting to come into your home and tell you how you and your family can celebrate Thanksgiving. From group-gathering restrictions, to travel restrictions, to curfews (because the virus knows the difference between night and day), to instituting new lockdowns, they are attempting to assert power over the people in any way that they can.

Our response? The response of the American people?

Absolutely not. We will not stand for it.

Our government is by the people, for the people – not by elitists, over the people. We will celebrate our holidays, in our own home, however we want, with however many people we want.

We REJECT your attempted tyranny. You cannot cancel Thanksgiving.

clean_body: Two weeks have passed since Election Day came and went, yet we still do not have a clear winner of the 2020 Presidential election. The Mainstream Media (unsurprisingly) has called the election for Joe Biden, but President Trump’s legal team claims this race is far from over. They say they have evidence of significant voter fraud that could potentially overturn the unofficial results in multiple states. This is HUGE news! While the Mainstream Media (aka the Democratic Propaganda Network) would like you to believe the election is over, it is most definitely not. Yes - Georgia, Pennsylvania, Wisconsin and Michigan are still in play. Bottom line? The final results across the nation have not been certified. The legal battle is still ongoing. The President has the legal and constitutional right to file lawsuits and to present evidence of fraud. This election is not over. To help President Trump and his efforts at transparency and election integrity, regarding the Georgia recount to the Georgia Secretary of State. They faced a typically hostile media who showed their bias and lack of understanding of how the law and legal proceedings actually work, but his team was strong, they didn’t give an inch, and they refused to allow the press to get away with asking biased questions based on false premises. Attorney Sidney Powell stated the following during the press conference, “This is stunning, heartbreaking, Infuriating and the most unpatriotic acts I can even imagine for people in this country to have participated in, in any way, shape or form, and I want the American public to know right now that we will not be intimidated. American patriots are fed up with the corruption from the local level to the highest level of our government, and we are going to take this country back. “We are not going to be intimidated. Overreaching Democratic officials are attempting to come into your home and tell you how you and your family can celebrate Thanksgiving. Our response? The response of the American people? Absolutely not. We will not stand for it. Our government is by the people, for the people – not by elitists, over the people. body:
---
| | | | | |
---
| Friend,
We have made tremendous strides this week in the fight to save our Senate majority. Over and over again, Raphael Warnock was exposed for what he really is: an anti-military, anti-law enforcement, far-left, Soros-funded radical liberal. And while Radical Raphael doubles down on his extreme record, Kelly and David Perdue are hitting the campaign trail and fighting for a strong win on Jan. 5.
Today, Kelly and David were [joined](http://r20.rs6.net/tn.jsp?f=001ghWl64f8u-G5Ydw6Sr7BPUnIgkw8h0OU2noM0uvsoYl1Ex9cf4m_AArUqphos1aG361RhcWpZZXGsxQwmLtxQik9qOfUNZ9a2dqhXjKpjJj0mT5v7519zd5_RtEHjvRbgD5LP7oOFmMh_dAg4WbAFA1F2aT6FElwl-Wi8QtPE4TCV2g5tThHNY2mhpRmHmTcbIEAnN5CL_lrT1cQDAQ_b-ohlfZAzFj1XS2790FcI6U=&c=vMbCgr5ZSumlIGqxhwxJG1CZ9zU5fcKqNU-57JNrNSwdVCA7ckwO6Q==&ch=AlUmktMc8M1q1Pb_KaZojrVGBzZNjDS54HtN3J1iIe9-xiqYmHN_Lg==) by Vice President Mike Pence, who rallied conservatives in [Canton](http://r20.rs6.net/tn.jsp?f=001ghWl64f8u-G5Ydw6Sr7BPUnIgkw8h0OU2noM0uvsoYl1Ex9cf4m_AArUqphos1aGZXGqNKu3N_UTWec4fEouVbCfsNA35bA3lfS7HomjcP6sPLvC1JzIlA3f4_m1Zxj1DCosvJlCttGpfhQYFFBEQlVvu2IeSpC6EuqnwUxIyeG0jLTUND90rCNAlEoviLa4-hWMXDA77Zs=&c=vMbCgr5ZSumlIGqxhwxJG1CZ9zU5fcKqNU-57JNrNSwdVCA7ckwO6Q==&ch=AlUmktMc8M1q1Pb_KaZojrVGBzZNjDS54HtN3J1iIe9-xiqYmHN_Lg==) and [Gainesville](http://r20.rs6.net/tn.jsp?f=001ghWl64f8u-G5Ydw6Sr7BPUnIgkw8h0OU2noM0uvsoYl1Ex9cf4m_AArUqphos1aGEHP2rtz0CCxKDbCxrPZ-VdZ0-dg0yDYWSi3dbNPlZlPbt-qo9RwmWhAUB6J6QQEK0HL_PWlAUibbhWa0KQYof8Pk0VvYwV2vxTFu_-G8l9YSqp2eK_9DGYwXEk7qg_wGNqVtAdMNopE=&c=vMbCgr5ZSumlIGqxhwxJG1CZ9zU5fcKqNU-57JNrNSwdVCA7ckwO6Q==&ch=AlUmktMc8M1q1Pb_KaZojrVGBzZNjDS54HtN3J1iIe9-xiqYmHN_Lg==). Thousands of people turned out at each event to hear from the Senators and Vice President, showing historic enthusiasm for a strong, conservative Georgia. And just yesterday, Kelly and David were [joined](http://r20.rs6.net/tn.jsp?f=001ghWl64f8u-G5Ydw6Sr7BPUnIgkw8h0OU2noM0uvsoYl1Ex9cf4m_AArUqphos1aGgMijKvHegtU24ks30xCVN13sY-clQZ185pLW3uU05j9zfFr4BOXKolnnP0ySTlft5EFHl7ppxTZ7cerHgwF-V_uSy8YDPSQbXUlBeoE5SZVbHe0lT4eMM3t2mypAsA9rRHZjKbV3aBU=&c=vMbCgr5ZSumlIGqxhwxJG1CZ9zU5fcKqNU-57JNrNSwdVCA7ckwO6Q==&ch=AlUmktMc8M1q1Pb_KaZojrVGBzZNjDS54HtN3J1iIe9-xiqYmHN_Lg==) by Senator Tom Cotton (R-AR) for a big [rally](http://r20.rs6.net/tn.jsp?f=001ghWl64f8u-G5Ydw6Sr7BPUnIgkw8h0OU2noM0uvsoYl1Ex9cf4m_AArUqphos1aGhj7NdPucl-ZeXGOVPtF8oECKW4WhLuVo66vsqJf-7gYuDhXgj5QFYhPCjtqNVoR7AUgkgbhkbKx5IHgOe7hrHVydFh_OcFW6OQuA-xvTw7pvCjlvdPlckN6k9Q5QOuxS4TcPcvHEe6cNh0duEaFrG-NImDfpzVsPYvf5Oqsiac_eSYwMDYX4mHCXy4J4t56A&c=vMbCgr5ZSumlIGqxhwxJG1CZ9zU5fcKqNU-57JNrNSwdVCA7ckwO6Q==&ch=AlUmktMc8M1q1Pb_KaZojrVGBzZNjDS54HtN3J1iIe9-xiqYmHN_Lg==) in Perry.

Don't miss out on this chance.
| Friend, With our first official fundraising deadline just around the corner, I wanted to make sure you saw Rainee's email. President-elect Biden has a clear mandate to make bold climate action a reality, starting on Day One. Evergreen Action is committed to helping his administration realize that vision -- and we want to make sure you're a part of it. **[This is your chance to keep momentum up and the pressure on for Biden's climate plan. Donate before Monday at midnight to become a Day One Donor and get your official Day One Membership Card.](https://act.evergreenaction.com/go/1199?t=2&akid=4582%2E53494%2EEtnO7K)** [](https://act.evergreenaction.com/go/1199?t=3&akid=4582%2E53494%2EEtnO7K) Thanks for being a part of this, Jamal Raad
Co-Founder and Campaign Director, Evergreen Action | [DONATE ](https://act.evergreenaction.com/go/1199?t=4&akid=4582%2E53494%2EEtnO7K)

\---- Forwarded message ----
From: Rainee Taylor, Evergreen Action
Date: Thu, Nov 19, 2020
Subject: INSIDE: Get your Day One Membership Card
[](https://act.evergreenaction.com/go/379?t=5&akid=4582%2E53494%2EEtnO7K)
Friend,
Joe Biden will become President Biden in 62 days.
He won the presidency by campaigning on bold climate action, specifically on building a just, inclusive clean energy economy. He'll take office with a considerable popular-vote victory and a mandate to deliver on that plan, starting on Day One in office.
Evergreen is laying the groundwork for his administration to make that plan a reality. **Will you join us in loudly championing and pushing for Joe Biden's climate mandate from now until Day One, friend?**
**[Donate by midnight on Monday to become an official Evergreen Day One Donor and receive your personalized Day One Membership Card!](https://act.evergreenaction.com/go/1199?t=6&akid=4582%2E53494%2EEtnO7K)**
[](https://act.evergreenaction.com/go/1199?t=7&akid=4582%2E53494%2EEtnO7K)
President-elect Biden has already committed to making important climate moves on Day One, including re-entering the Paris Agreement and reversing Donald Trump's 120+ environmental rollbacks.
The months that follow will be critical to Biden's long-term success on climate and clean energy. Similarly, the next two months are crucial for us to keep up the momentum on Biden's climate mandate.
**[Donate today to become a Day One Donor and power our work to put bold climate action at the top of our nation's agenda. We'll even send you a personalized Day One Membership Card!](https://act.evergreenaction.com/go/1199?t=8&akid=4582%2E53494%2EEtnO7K)**
Thanks for everything you've done -- from Evergreen's Day One to Biden's Day One.
Rainee Taylor
Digital Strategist, Evergreen Action

Peter - My campaign against Maxine Waters isn't over yet.

Our campaign has received multiple reports from people with firsthand knowledge of possible fraudulent ballots and ballot irregularities, **and I won't end my campaign without ensuring the results of this election are fair, accurate and free of illegalities.**

_The voters of California's 43rd District deserve nothing less!_

**To ensure the results are fair, my team and I are gathering evidence and preparing for a recount of our race here in Los Angeles County.**

[**But a recount will be _extremely_ expensive, and we frankly can't ensure the results of this election are fair and accurate without your help. name: George Buck
subject: 2 Senate Seats Up For Grabs in Georgia
body:
Image

https://clicks.aweber.com/y/ct/?l=7RSOW&m=gvqiGc5PurcqI4c&b=_Qha.tPO6.AHoOsq3cigWA

Hi Peter,

They are stealing the Presidential election. Now the Left wants to steal the U.S. Senate - and we need to fight back to "Save the Senate"!

My name is Dr. George Buck, and I am a retired firefighter and U.S. Airborne Army veteran. I am writing to you on behalf of Drain the DC Swamp PAC, which has been helping good America First conservatives like you and me in Pennsylvania, Georgia, Florida, and around the country!

I have dedicated my time and efforts to fighting for the President and his agenda - and right now we need your help!

We are in the midst of the fight of our lives - a struggles whose stakes are so high, if we lose, we may well lose the Republic.

Consider this: right now, the President is trying to make sure that all the LEGAL votes are counted.

But as he fights in the courts, there is another fight in Georgia that is just as important.

As Nancy Pelosi has had control over the House, the Senate has been the death of many bad Democrat ideas- and affirmed so many of the President's excellent judges and nominees.

Put frankly, we NEED the Senate- and we MUST have control over the Senate, especially if Biden does steal the Presidency.

If worst comes to worst- control over the Senate will be all we have to stop the radical Left.

Image

https://clicks.aweber.com/y/ct/?l=7RSOW&m=gvqiGc5PurcqI4c&b=_Qha.tPO6.AHoOsq3cigWA

You've seen what nonsense AOC and the Squad have been pushing for the last two years.

You've seen her push to "defund the police", but that would only be the beginning, without a Republican Senate.

Bad ideas like endless entitlements, the Green New Deal, high taxes, Socialism.... that's our future, if we don't win BOTH of these races in Georgia.

Make no mistake, it really is THAT important. Heck, Chuck Schumer boasted of it- he will be spending $100 million on those races.

The Left is all in. That means we must meet their intensity.

https://clicks.aweber.com/y/ct/?l=7RSOW&m=gvqiGc5PurcqI4c&b=_Qha.tPO6.AHoOsq3cigWA

Image

https://clicks.aweber.com/y/ct/?l=7RSOW&m=gvqiGc5PurcqI4c&b=_Qha.tPO6.AHoOsq3cigWA

But it really stars Schumer, the Senate’s top Democrat, whose eight-word vow bookends the 30-second spot: “Now we take Georgia, then we change America.”

Schumer was filmed making those remarks on Saturday in the afterglow of President-elect Joe Biden’s victory. They play into longstanding GOP attacks in Georgia that Democrats are puppets of out-of-state interests who are too extreme for the state.

Scott, a potential presidential candidate who will soon chair the National Republican Senatorial Committee, said Schumer’s “change” would bring a vast overhaul to Washington if Democrats Jon Ossoff and Raphael Warnock prevail over U.S. Sens. Kelly Loeffler and David Perdue. The twin runoffs will likely determine control of the Senate.

“That’s Democrat leader Chuck Schumer. You heard him: they plan to take Georgia so they can change America. Their change: Reduce funding for police, eliminate employer-based health insurance, pack the Supreme Court, chip away at our religious freedom and gun rights.”

Image

https://clicks.aweber.com/y/ct/?l=7RSOW&m=gvqiGc5PurcqI4c&b=_Qha.tPO6.AHoOsq3cigWA

For years now, Drain the DC Swamp PAC has been fighting for the America First agenda. From getting out the vote for the President in Pennsylvania to electing pro-Trump conservatives in Georgia, we have put our resources toward fighting the Left- and with fantastic results!

We want to go back to Georgia to make sure we win TWO Senate races- to make sure that, if worst comes to worst, there is a check on Joe Biden's worst impulses.

We want to make sure that exactly ZERO of AOC's bad ideas ever becomes law.

We want to protect your Constitutionally protected rights, but we can't do that if Chuck Schumer gets control over the Senate!

We MUST win two of two races there. The stakes couldn't be higher. Will you help us?

https://clicks.aweber.com/y/ct/?l=7RSOW&m=gvqiGc5PurcqI4c&b=_Qha.tPO6.AHoOsq3cigWA

Your contribution is so crucial. Your $25, 50, 100, 250, 500, 1000 or more will send an immediate message to the Left

https://clicks.aweber.com/y/ct/?l=7RSOW&m=gvqiGc5PurcqI4c&b=_Qha.tPO6.AHoOsq3cigWA
- that neither Georgia, NOR America is theirs!

We have come so far with the America First agenda. We can't turn back now! Help us push forward and win in Georgia

https://clicks.aweber.com/y/ct/?l=7RSOW&m=gvqiGc5PurcqI4c&b=_Qha.tPO6.AHoOsq3cigWA
, for America!

Respectfully,

Image

https://clicks.aweber.com/y/ct/?l=7RSOW&m=gvqiGc5PurcqI4c&b=PjnC8GEHAXokNXgOJHVvFw

George Buck Phd

Airborne Veteran and Firefighter

Conservative

P.S. Our nation is in crisis. Socialists control the House of Representatives, they want to pack the Supreme Court, and the Presidency is going through litigation and recounts. The ONLY firewall we have against all of that is the United States Senate - and that could change if we lose on January 5th in Georgia. Donate right now to help us save the Senate.

https://clicks.aweber.com/y/ct/?l=7RSOW&m=gvqiGc5PurcqI4c&b=_Qha.tPO6.AHoOsq3cigWA
We must elect Kelly Loeffler and David Perdue.

5 Halifax Ct
Marlton NJ 08053
USA

To unsubscribe or change subscriber options, visit:

name: Gina Raimondo
subject: Our hospitals
body:
---
| | | | | |
---
| Hello friend,
Yesterday, I announced a two-week pause starting on November 30. We'll increase restrictions on certain businesses during that time, and social gatherings will continue to be limited to a single household. This isn't easy. It's going to be a difficult two weeks. But we're doing this to prevent overwhelming our hospital system. That means avoiding the need to ration beds and limit care -- ultimately saving lives.
Hospitalizations are rising at a faster rate now than ever. Already, we're on track to open our field hospitals within the next few weeks. And if those hospitals start filling up, it'll mean turning off other critical procedures. Any doctor will tell you they're now seeing more severe health issues - more developed cancers - because people cancelled routine screenings in March and April. We don't want to be there again.
In the Spring, we built these field hospitals in a matter of weeks. That was a herculean effort. But we also knew that if we had to open them, we'd be limited by the number of healthcare workers available to care for our patients. Last week, you heard from some of our emergency room doctors about how overwhelmed our frontline workers already are.
Now, it's in our hands. The individual decisions we make over the next three weeks can turn around the trend and get our hospitalizations to a manageable level. Please, do not spend Thanksgiving with people you don't live with. Stick to essential activities like school and work, getting food, medicine and other critical goods, and going to the doctor. I know it's hard. Pandemic fatigue is real. But if we take the next few weeks seriously, we can avoid a more severe shutdown - we can save lives and save jobs.
We're all in this together.
-Gina Raimondo Governor
P.S.: Information is our greatest weapon in the fight against COVID-19. If you or someone you know wants to sign up to receive these emails, you can use [this link](http://r20.rs6.net/tn.jsp?f=001Y7ZRh1d9O_dx97ylA_wIzOjQ4XhKSeNwG0ExMiiDKE5_HEZc2HCMDgcp3h6kbeN5hT5-QeIpMoadgqfei6ghroDCw-b2eIYea-PkvHf80QAvs_JnHj4rs9Ao3KQRB0KZyVylrXl00akBhj2uO3deNjq77nT2YVjWtl7DseAYWL9wck-A_vlMkd7qMNKAIM2zHEphkbn8_CK9zllv76d8o1OF0z4YCxuZPNW7h0umQp4MCca_c1R_VifGlG-Q7qZxUi9wuYI5UqujE39CmUfS7r_U7kPEOdc3TQSei4lTMz8gUDt0TSQLTs3IHNNaqXyhRo1n0p3ohV8=&c=r4q7BDYIxgJ6yhgOqriPsBQf9YYsP7HuxoVC8JGKAyDq8Ds8gi7-Dg==&ch=MrP8JWCQR3TR7cPJcYOMnjIJVokz8trk7tmf4RqzyT79qTOF5kk_ZQ==).

body:

|
---
|

| **_Hard Work & Results _**
This week, the Indiana General Assembly was back at the Statehouse for Organization Day. Org Day marks the ceremonial start of the legislative session, and it was the first chance to see this session's new Republican supermajority (even larger in the Indiana House!) in action!

And even while some things might look different this session, rest assured that the same commitment to transparency and a balanced budget remain consistent.

"The key is to have a transparent session that allows the citizens and stakeholders to be active participants in it, and also allows them to feel like their voice can be heard. And yet, do it in a safe and smart manner,” said **Senate President Pro Tem Rod Bray**.

On Tuesday, **Senator Bray** committed to passing a balanced budget that fully funds schools, protects entities from some COVID-19 legal liabilities, redistricts when census numbers come in, and addresses continuing issues with health care costs and affordable, high-speed broadband.

We heard a similar commitment from **Speaker Todd Huston** , as he leads the Indiana House for his first session as speaker. He committed that together, we’ll continue to take what we’ve learned through this pandemic, and use those lessons to provide even greater government service to Hoosiers.

"We will continue to promote and encourage an atmosphere of civility and bipartisanship, especially as we navigate the challenges of this pandemic together," said **Speaker Huston**.

As we look to enter this coming budget session, I’m excited to see the continued hard work – and results – that are soon to come for Hoosiers.

-Kyle Hupfer
**_PHOTO:_**_Chairman Hupfer led a caucus on Sunday night in Lawrence, where precinct committeemen in Senate District 31 elected**Senator Kyle Walker** as the district’s new voice in the Indiana Senate. Congratulations, **Senator Walker**!_
---
|
---
| | **Governor Holcomb's Week That Was**
---
|
---
| **_Continuing to Build One Indiana For All_** It's been another busy week for** Governor Holcomb**! He cut the ribbon on Huntington University's new Don Strauss Animal Science Education Center, he announced that Dr. Katie Jenner will serve as Indiana’s first Secretary of Education, and he announced that Karrah A. Herring will serve as Indiana’s first-ever chief equity, inclusion and opportunity officer.

On Monday, **Governor Holcomb** was proud to officially cut the ribbon at Huntington University's new Don Strauss Animal Science Education Center. This new 10,000-square-foot space will house many of the key livestock elements of Huntington’s agriculture degrees. Agriculture is our state's calling card and Gov. Holcomb will always support Hoosier farmers and our state's ag community.

And then on Thursday,**Governor Holcomb** was excited to announce Indiana's first Secretary of Education, Dr. Katie Jenner. Dr. Jenner currently serves as **Governor Holcomb’s** senior education advisor. In her new role she will focus on supporting schools through and beyond the COVID-19 pandemic, providing all students with personalized pathways to prepare them for lifelong success, championing the educator profession, and cultivating a future-ready education system. **_“As Indiana’s Secretary of Education, Dr. Jenner’s certification, work at nearly every level of education and her remarkable depth of experience will lead our state into this exciting next chapter.” -Governor Holcomb_** **Governor Holcomb** also announced that Karrah A. Herring will serve as Indiana's first-ever chief equity, inclusion and opportunity officer. The officer will focus on improving state government operations as well as drive systemic change to remove hurdles in the government workplace and services the state provides. In addition to naming Herring, the governor also announced that the CenterPoint Energy Foundation is supporting the state’s diversity and inclusion programs and services. _**“My goal is to better build diversity and foster an inclusive environment within state government and the services we provide so every Hoosier can take full advantage of their gifts and potential. Karrah will guide every state agency with her impressive experience at one of our state’s world-renowned universities.” -Governor Holcomb**_ To stay up to date on the latest developments, please make sure you're following** Governor Holcomb** on [Facebook](https://indgop.us11.list-manage.com/track/click?u=89fb3de929a99eecb88e6fb27&id=ed44bd6367&e=1acd9bb3d6), [Twitter](https://indgop.us11.list-manage.com/track/click?u=89fb3de929a99eecb88e6fb27&id=d38b8131d4&e=1acd9bb3d6) and [Instagram](https://indgop.us11.list-manage.com/track/click?u=89fb3de929a99eecb88e6fb27&id=1bf7082d22&e=1acd9bb3d6)!
---
|
---
| **_We Need Your Help in Georgia_**
Hoosiers won the home game, easily. Now we need a road win.

If Democrats get control of the Senate, with Nancy Pelosi already caving to the demands of the socialist Squad in the House, we'll see a radical, leftwing agenda like never before. Packing the Supreme Court, abolishing the Electoral College, The Green New Deal, statehood for Washington DC, defunding the police, and all the other leftwing wish list items will be one step closer to happening.

This is where you come in. Can you volunteer a weekend or two for Senators David Perdue and Kelly Loeffler between now and the runoff on January 5?

Hoosiers willing to deploy to Georgia and volunteer by making calls and knocking on doors to save our country should fill out the link below.
[\--> Click here to volunteer for Senator David Perdue and Kelly Loeffler in Georgia <\--](https://indgop.us11.list-manage.com/track/click?u=89fb3de929a99eecb88e6fb27&id=01738379c6&e=1acd9bb3d6)
Expenses such as flights, hotels, and meals will be covered for trips a weekend or longer. The runoff is on January 5th, so you can go anytime from now until then.
---
|
---
| | _**Gubernatorial Inauguration Events Postponed**_
Chairman Kyle Hupfer announced today that traditional celebratory events related to Governor Holcomb's swearing in will be postponed due to the COVID-19 pandemic. Information regarding the legal swearing in of Governor Holcomb for his second term will be released at a later date.

**“While we’d love to celebrate our historic victories together to usher in the second term of Governor Holcomb, the time just isn’t right to do so. It remains our full intent to appropriately celebrate the governor’s reelection with the entire team that made it possible when circumstances allow. We’ll update our supporters later as to when that might occur,” **said Hupfer.
---
|
